content: agent1: working on NDCG IDCG fix in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py. Will touch NDCG class only.

agent1: My fix (already applied) changes IDCG in NDCG.compute() to: idcg = sum(discounted_gain(rel=True, i=i, mode=mode) for i in range(1, len(expected_set) + 1)) -- i.e. drop the min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) and just use len(expected_set). This is orthogonal to relevance_scores/graded relevance support. Please build your graded-relevance IDCG on top of this (i.e. iterate to len(expected_set) or len(relevance_scores) as appropriate, not min with retrieved length). Since we're both editing NDCG.compute() in the same file, please pull/re-read the file before editing so you don't clobber my change, and let me know once you've made your edit so I can rebase mine if needed.
